what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets channel image named Feature_7_Markup; it stores metadata such as id, address, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, authorship, and timestamps, but contains no image content or body text.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no markdown body
Represents an image/png asset in the design-assets/icons path
Width and height are recorded as 0
Version 1 has a single version entry with an empty alt field
Provenance fields include source dragnet and author_session ch-3mpkjg3r
standouts: Image dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image record
Alt text is empty in the version entry
No links or downstream references are recorded
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed ledger field schema
Follows the channel-memory image record naming convention image__<channel>_<path>.md
References binary content via a blob:// URI
Records provenance via source, author_session, created, and updated timestamps
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate placeholder or unanalyzed metadata
Empty alt text reduces accessibility metadata for the asset
No links or usage references make it hard to discover where the icon is used from this file alone
notes: A bare asset metadata stub for a markup-related feature icon in the design-assets channel, with unresolved dimensions and no usage links.
questions: Why are the width and height zero for an image/png record?
Is the empty alt field intentional or awaiting a description?
What UI feature or screen does Feature_7_Markup correspond to?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a design asset, but it currently catalogs only placeholder-like metadata (0x0 dimensions, empty alt) rather than a fully characterized image record.
apparent_themes: Binary asset indirection via blob references
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to register a markup-themed feature icon in the design-assets ledger so it can be addressed, versioned, and referenced over time.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record for a markup feature icon, including a blob reference and authorship provenance that a fused system can use to locate and version the underlying image.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger file describing a design-assets icon named Feature_7_Markup as an image/png with a blob reference, zero dimensions, empty alt text, and no recorded links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a markup-related feature icon in the design-assets channel for later reference and fusion.
